{{util.appTranslate('withdrawal_history_detail')}}

{{util.appTranslate('th_id')}}: {{id | uppercase}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_status')}}: @if (status == 'created') { {{util.appTranslate('pending')}} } @if (status == 'accepted') { {{util.appTranslate('accepted')}} } @if (status == 'rejected') { {{util.appTranslate('rejected')}} }
{{util.appTranslate('th_amount')}}: {{util.priceFormat(amount)}}
{{util.appTranslate('payout_method')}}: {{methodName}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_payout_creds')}}
@if (status == 'created') {
@for (item of restaurantPayoutMethodCredential; track $index) {
{{item.fieldName}}: {{item.fieldValue}}
}
} @if (status != 'created') {
@for (item of formElementCredential; track $index) {
{{item.fieldName}}: {{item.fieldValue}}
}
}
@if (status =='accepted') {
{{util.appTranslate('approval_notes')}}: {{approvedNotes}}
@if (proof !== '') {
}
} @if (status =='rejected') {
{{util.appTranslate('rejection_notes')}}: {{rejectedReason}}
}
